title: labichea teretifolia subsp. grandistipulata
intro: Labichea teretifolia subsp. grandistipulata is a species of flowering plant in the family Apocynaceae. It is traditionally used in various cultures for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to offer several health benefits, such as reducing fever, treating skin conditions, and aiding in wound healing. In traditional medicine, Labichea teretifolia subsp. grandistipulata is prepared as a decoction or infusion, which can be taken orally to harness its medicinal properties.
